name: Yamazaki Co., Ltd.
summary: Yamazaki Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automated equipment, machine tools, electronic equipment, and motorcycle parts in Japan and internationally. The company offers FMS units, indexing tables, spindle and multi-spindle heads, turret heads, drilling units, tapping units, and others; and honing, transfer, and balancer machines, as well as machining centers. It also provides electronic devices; hybrid power generation systems; and service systems. Yamazaki Co., Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Hamamatsu, Japan.
